definitions.usage_example: I like coffee, but I prefer tea.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: I like coffee, but I prefer tea.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Usado para introducir una frase o cláusula que contrasta con lo que ya se ha dicho.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used to introduce a phrase or clause contrasting with what has already been said.

definitions.usage_example: If it rains, I will stay home.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: If it rains, I will stay home.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Usado para introducir una condición (algo que debe pasar primero).]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used to introduce a condition (something that must happen first).
